Pray.PrayWord: Kim nang khac Moc, Moc kien Kim khuyet! Ngay nay viec hanh su tuy co loi, nhung dieu kho khan cung ko the xem thuong
Pray.PrayThing: Suy sau nghi ky; hanh su lo mang thi chi nem trai dang ma thoi.

Pray.PrayWord: Kim nang sinh Thuy, Thuy da Kim tram! Dung vu luc doat loi, thi chi chuoc lay cai hai.
Pray.PrayThing: Tuc vu chi qua; cac ha ngay nay dung nen nghi den viec danh nhau, hay lo tu duong ban than.

Pray.PrayWord: Kim suy ngo Hoa, tat kien tieu dong! Cuong dich truoc mat, can than hanh su.
Pray.PrayThing: An binh bat dong; quan sat dong tinh, tuong ke hanh dong, mao muoi tan cong at that bai.

Pray.PrayWord: Kim lai Tho sinh, Tho da Kim mai! Thoi hu tat xau se chon vui tai nang mot con nguoi.
Pray.PrayThing: Rong con an thi khong dung duoc, troi dich chuyen manh me, nguoi quan tu suot ngay tu cuong.

Pray.PrayWord: Moc nhuoc phung Kim, tat vi chuoc chiet! Ngay nay, hanh su chi co hai ma khong co loi.
Pray.PrayThing: Goi dau cao ma nam; ngay nay khong nghi den viec tranh doat thi ngay sau khi ngu khong phai lo au.

Pray.PrayWord: Moc lai Thuy sinh, Thuy da Moc phieu! So menh chua het, viec lo buon at chua dut.
Pray.PrayThing: Vien lu; nghia la nguoi quan tu khong lo xa at se nghi gan, van khi ngay nay chua dut, viec dang lo truoc sau gi cung den thoi.

Pray.PrayWord: Moc nang sinh Hoa, Hoa da Moc phan! Thoi van da het, con duong van menh that kho doan.
Pray.PrayThing: Tinh hau giai am; nghia la lay su nhan nai de doi nhan xu the, at co phuc lon ve sau.

Pray.PrayWord: Moc nang khac Tho, Tho da Moc chiet! Thoi van den, vo phuc at tieu vong.
Pray.PrayThing: Vat chiem tieu loi; cai loi nho nhu dau con ruoi, nguoi quan tu khong quan tam.

Pray.PrayWord: Thuy lai Kim sinh, Kim da Thuy troc. Tinh chat cua nuoc von bao dung nhung cung co gioi han.
Pray.PrayThing: Sua tinh de hanh su; viec bao dung vo han co khi lam hai nguoi khac.

Pray.PrayWord: Thuy nang sinh Moc, Moc da Thuy thuc! Moi viec cung the, dau duoi cung do su do ky ghen ghet ma hong ca.
Pray.PrayThing: Binh thuong tam; vi nhu cho di mot vat thi at nhan duoc su dap tra, neu khong nhu the, moi moi quan he khong ben vung.

Pray.PrayWord: Thuy nang khac Hoa, Hoa da Thuy can! Tinh tuy vo bien nhung cuoc song thi huu han, nen biet dieu do.
Pray.PrayThing: Tam me muoi; nhu lua manh, nuoc yeu kho dap tat, hay can than.

Pray.PrayWord: Thuy nhuoc phung Tho, tat vi u tac! Khong Tu nhap the, khanh lam the nao de hung manh.
Pray.PrayThing: Tam trang duoi anh ta duong, xuan da tan, long da ua, mua thu cu that kho tim lai duoc, con duong xua khien long nguoi boi hoi.

Pray.PrayWord: Hoa nang khac Kim, Kim da Hoa tuc! Viec hanh su ngay nay tuong doi thuan loi, nhung khong phai khong co kho khan.
Pray.PrayThing: Moi viec deu phai dung tam; dau viec kho nan giai phuc tap den dau, chi can can than thi kho ma sai lam.

Pray.PrayWord: Hoa lai Moc sinh, Moc da Hoa si! Trang chi chua thoa, long khong khoi non nao.
Pray.PrayThing: Tinh tam; tam loan thi chi kho thanh; chi can ra ngoai thanh phia dong la thay truc moc xanh xanh; gan day nhung chang uu phien.

Pray.PrayWord: Hoa nhuoc phung Thuy, tat vi tuc diet. Chi lon khong nen nan, chi vi thoi co chua den.
Pray.PrayThing: Nam gai nem mat; nguoi quan tu doi thoi co ma hanh dong, co duoc thanh cong ngay nay thi xua kia cung da vat va nhoc nhan.

Pray.PrayWord: Hoa nang sinh Tho, Tho da Hoa hoi! Chi chua thoa, tam chua yen.
Pray.PrayThing: Nghe ga gay thuc day mua kiem, ren luyen chi khi, con duong nhap the, that lam hiem nguy, sai lang ho bao, phai het suc than trong.

Pray.PrayWord: Tho nang sinh Kim, Kim da Tho bien! Moi bien huyen deu tro ve nguon coi.
Pray.PrayThing: Dot huong tam goi; an tam tinh duong; tam hon ngay thang.

Pray.PrayWord: Tho nhuoc phung Moc, tat vi khuynh ham! Cay giong nhu cai loi, nguoi quan tu tranh xa dieu do.
Pray.PrayThing: Chinh tam thuat; coi doi gio bui nhu may noi, khong co loi cho viec tu duong tam tinh ban than, hay tranh xa no.

Pray.PrayWord: Tho nang khac Thuy, Thuy da Tho luu! Nuoc, giong nhu nguoi loan tam, thai qua lam ton hai den tu vi.
Pray.PrayThing: Theo thien ma nghi; khong phai vat ben ngoai loan ma la do tam dong ca thoi, hay tinh tam lai.

Pray.PrayWord: Tho lai Hoa sinh, Thuy da Tho luu! Dung gap gap, duc toc bat dat.
Pray.PrayThing: Noi chuyen dau gai canh cui; ket ban voi nuoc, lay suoi trong lam tra, sao troi lam niem vui.

Pray.PrayWord: Luong Kim khac Moc, cay tuy cung nhung sat van de dang be gay! Viec hanh su ngay nay loi nhieu hon hai.
Pray.PrayThing: Anh dung chinh la duong dau voi thu thach, rut ra duoc nhung kinh nghiem tu that bai, do la con duong cua ke manh.

Pray.PrayWord: Luong Kim sinh Thuy, nuoc tuy nhieu nhung khong the chim! Dung vu luc de dau voi nhau, nguoi nay duoc thi nguoi kia mat.
Pray.PrayThing: Can than khi dung vu luc, dem vu luc hai nguoi at da tu hai chinh minh.

Pray.PrayWord: Song Kim ngo Hoa, Hoa tuy manh, nhung nung chay Kim khong phai de. Quyet chi dau, thanh cong hay khong se biet ngay.
Pray.PrayThing: Duoc an ca nga ve khong; nguoi quan tu khong co duong thoi lui, chi co mot cach la tien len phia truoc.

Pray.PrayWord: Luong Kim Tho mai, vi nhu nguoi co tai nang xuat chung, at co ngay phai boc lo.
Pray.PrayThing: Ra mat dai nhan thi loi; ngua thien ly o giua cho dong, duy chi co Ba Lac nhan ra chung.

Pray.PrayWord: Song Moc phung Kim, cay tuy mem yeu, cung kho be gay! Hanh su ngay nay loi nhieu hon hai.
Pray.PrayThing: Bai nhung van muon tiep tuc chien dau, that bai cang nhieu, chien dau cang hang, do la hinh tuong cua ke manh.

Pray.PrayWord: Song Moc tai Thuy, diec kha vi chu! So menh tai troi, tuan theo ma song.
Pray.PrayThing: Thuan theo tu nhien; cay co the lam thuyen, dung tam de di tren nuoc.

Pray.PrayWord: Song Moc co Hoa, Moc nan phan. Con duong cua nguoi quan tu, that thenh thang.
Pray.PrayThing: Lon mat hanh su; con duong phia truoc lam hiem nguy, nguoi co dung khi at chien thang.

Pray.PrayWord: Doi Moc co Tho, thoi van thuan loi, dieu tot dep den lien tuc.
Pray.PrayThing: Con duong so menh lam trai ngang; nhung co troi giup, thi cho du gap kho khan gi deu vuot qua duoc.

Pray.PrayWord: Luong Thuy Kim sinh, Kim tuy nhieu, cung khong de duc. Chuyen tinh cam, phai bao dung.
Pray.PrayThing: Con duong tinh cam, von chang de dang, nen bao dung tao phuc.

Pray.PrayWord: Luong Thuy sinh Moc, Moc tuy nhieu, cung khong then voi luong tam.
Pray.PrayThing: Dung tam long khoan dung ma doi dai; thot len tieng noi tu day long minh; to tuong nhu anh trang khuya.

Pray.PrayWord: Nuoc manh lua yeu, thang bai da ro! Nuoc va lua von xua nay xung khac.
Pray.PrayThing: Than pho chan tam; can nguyen lay da tinh doi dai vo tinh, nuoc chay hoa roi.

Pray.PrayWord: Nuoc cho du yeu nhung van xoi mon duoc dat, nhu tinh tham thi kho khuoc tu
Pray.PrayThing: Tim me muoi, tinh tham sau, co the lam tan trai tim bang gia.

Pray.PrayWord: Luong Hoa khac Kim, Kim tuy cung nhung Hoa van de dang nung chay! Tren nung duoi dot, du vung chac den dau cung kho ma chiu noi.
Pray.PrayThing: Sam chop gio giat, nguoi lam viec lon, khong nen cau ne tieu tiet, quyet nhanh danh nhanh.

Pray.PrayWord: Ngau Hoa ky Moc, nan phan tam! Theo tu nhien ma lam, at thanh cong.
Pray.PrayThing: Ban tinh binh than, cho du co luc tam gap xao dong, van co the che ngu duoc de dang.

Pray.PrayWord: Gom duoc thanh lua, co the chong duoc nuoc! Suc manh cua ke tieu tot, khong the xem thuong.
Pray.PrayThing: Cham soc ke duoi; trang chi da toai, ke be toi lap tuc bo di, tran an long quan.

Pray.PrayWord: Song Hoa sinh Tho, chi da toai! Hoai bao van chua nguoi, thiet dai ban be.
Pray.PrayThing: Ngoi quanh noi; uong nuoc noi chuyen vui ve, uong sua bo, nghi ve con duong phia truoc.

Pray.PrayWord: Song Tho ham Kim, ren luyen duc tai! Chi trai chang son, khiem ton cho doi.
Pray.PrayThing: Tua lan can nghi ngoi gi; Chan troi xa tit lieu phi truoc manh; Troi xanh nuoc cung xanh xanh; Thuyen ai phieu bat nam canh chang ve.

Pray.PrayWord: Song Tho phung Moc, nan vi ham. Cai loi nho be trong chon tran tuc, nguoi quan tu khong ho then.
Pray.PrayThing: Hai cuc duoi giau dong; bui hong cuon cuon; ao trang nhu tuyet.

Pray.PrayWord: Boi Tho khac Thuy, tu vi co. Dan vao noi canh dep, mau xanh chua dat den muc thuan khiet.
Pray.PrayThing: Dot lo; den khi lua xanh biec, nghien ngam sach xua, doi than don.

Pray.PrayWord: Dat day dan, lua manh me! Khong hieu nguyen co, hoi troi xanh.
Pray.PrayThing: Xem thien van; thien co khong the lo, nguoi quan tu tu thong suot, tuan theo menh troi.

Pray.PrayWord: Tam Kim khac Moc, kien Moc lap doan! Ngay tot de dau vo.
Pray.PrayThing: Cac ha tren dau truong ngay hom nay de dang thu duoc thang loi.

Pray.PrayWord: Tam Kim Sinh Thuy, Thuy da bat tram! Dung vo luc thuan loi.
Pray.PrayThing: Di vu vi dung; thoi co tot de dung vo doat loi, thien tai!

Pray.PrayWord: Tam Kim ngo Hoa, Kim da Hoa di diet! Chi vung nhu thanh tri, kho lay chuyen noi.
Pray.PrayThing: Doan ket phan tien; dong suc dong long, bao nguy kho deu de dang vuot qua.

Pray.PrayWord: Tam Kim tai Tho, mui nhon moi nhu, sao lai dung dat mem ma chon no.
Pray.PrayThing: Mao Toai tu tien; ren luyen duc tai, thoi co khong doi ta, chi co Mao Toai tu tien.

Pray.PrayWord: Tam Moc phung Kim, nan vi chuoc chiet! Ngay dung nhu thang cuong.
Pray.PrayThing: Dau vo; bac dai hiep the vo mem yeu, nhung co hoi chien thang cung khong it.

Pray.PrayWord: Tam Moc nhap Thuy, song to kho vuot! Van tot da den, quy ma kho can.
Pray.PrayThing: Nghich kich luu; thien loi dia loi, tuy nguoc dong nhung thuyen van tien len phia truoc.

Pray.PrayWord: Cay da thanh rung, lua nho kho dot duoc! Menh troi da dinh, so phan kho thoat.
Pray.PrayThing: The thien hanh dao; duong dau voi menh troi, nguoi quan tu khong so hai tranh ne.

Pray.PrayWord: Chung Moc khac Tho, da Tho nan ton. Con duong thenh thang, tien buoc thuan loi.
Pray.PrayThing: Vien hanh; Con duong gai goc moc day, Quy nhan phu tro lo gi chang qua.

Pray.PrayWord: Tam Thuy Kim sinh, troc Kim kha thanh! Viec nhay cam nho nhat, kho ma noi thang duoc.
Pray.PrayThing: Chuc song da thoai; dem dai dang dac, cung chong den ben cua so voi thuyen quyen.

Pray.PrayWord: Nhu dong suoi tuon ra, tuy nho nhung chang bao gio chay nguoc dong. Nuoc khong sau, nhung lai chua dung duoc rat nhieu thu.
Pray.PrayThing: Thuong tam phi; voi khi so hom nay, nguoi khac kho thang duoc, duong tinh thenh thang.

Pray.PrayWord: Nuoc chay menh mong, mot ngon den sang! Tinh nay canh nay, cam long that kho.
Pray.PrayThing: Cam den xem dieu mua; dem duoc hoa, long rao ruc.

Pray.PrayWord: Tam Thuy vi nhat, the nhu ba dao! Rua sach bun dat, vang that hien ra.
Pray.PrayThing: Giang ho dong lo; chan troi nhu mong; hinh bong voi va, gio mua khong ngan duoc.

Pray.PrayWord: Tam Hoa khac Kim, kien Kim vi dung! The lua hung huc, tram suoi ngan khe deu kho han.
Pray.PrayThing: Dung vang truc tien; tien len khong ngoanh nhin phia sau, lam nguy khong nao nung.

Pray.PrayWord: Hoa tiem liet, Moc tro uy! Trang chi anh hung, so troi da dinh.
Pray.PrayThing: Chinh hanh trang; duong chan troi, xanh menh mong; long du hiep khong ti vet.

Pray.PrayWord: Lua hung huc, nuoc yeu kho, khong the chong lai.
Pray.PrayThing: An hanh; viec thien ha, lua the ma hanh dong, se thanh cong lon.

Pray.PrayWord: Chan Hoa tu thu, thang loi di vong! Bay gau duoi huou, thit huou con nao duoc, chua the biet.
Pray.PrayThing: Ly tu lu; muu ke sau xa, con huou chet boi tay ta.

Pray.PrayWord: Hau Tho loi Kim, tai nang kho luyen! Cua sai dong lai da lau, ngay sinh lo lang biet dau ma lan.
Pray.PrayThing: Dong cua phia dong di cua tay; tuoi gia xe bong, co nga sac vang, som mai tinh giac, vo canh bay di.

Pray.PrayWord: Tam Tho vi khau, nhuoc Moc ha vi hoan! Ta lay long minh doi choi voi khoang troi bao la rong lon.
Pray.PrayThing: Ngam thi dung tat; doc tho cu, noi chat hep de an nhan, ngam nga ca xuong thu tieu dao.

Pray.PrayWord: Tu vi cua anh, vi nhu dat day, nhung van con nhung y nghi pham tuc, khong biet phai lam the nao.
Pray.PrayThing: Be quan; tuong xua am u, bong tien thap thoang, kho tu noi nay, som thanh chinh qua.

Pray.PrayWord: Lo bui dong, lua yeu ot! Lo da lanh.
Pray.PrayThing: Tuc lo; yen lang doi lo nguoi, khong biet lam the nao cho nhanh chong, ngay khac than don se luyen xong.

Pray.PrayWord: Kim viet tung cach, dac tinh Kim thay doi, bien chat. Ngu Kim, la cuc diem cua Kim.
Pray.PrayThing: Chien vu; ngay nay, bac dai hiep phai lo giu nha bao ve dat nuoc, kien cong lap nghiep!

Pray.PrayWord: Chung Kim khac Moc, thien ha vo kien moc! Dich khong the thang ta duoc.
Pray.PrayThing: Du nhan chien; bac dai hiep ngay nay chien dau voi dich nhan, bach chien bach thang.

Pray.PrayWord: Chung Kim sinh Thuy, nhuoc Thuy nan tram! Vu! Khong co noi thich hop khong the phat huy toi da duoc.
Pray.PrayThing: Sam quan; cac ha ngay nay vuot ai, at chien thang.

Pray.PrayWord: Vang that khong so lua, bao kiem sac ben phai qua duc luyen.
Pray.PrayThing: Kien dinh y chi; muoi nam kho tu hom som, huong hoa mai tu noi kho lanh bay toi.

Pray.PrayWord: Chung Kim chi quang, hau Tho nan yem! Ba Lac di xa van dam de tim.
Pray.PrayThing: Chinh trang dai Ba Lac; tai nang cua nguoi quan tu, vang danh bon be.

Pray.PrayWord: Chung Moc phung Kim, loi Kim nan doan! Gap van may.
Pray.PrayThing: Do kiep; cac ha hom nay tuy gap phai tu dia, nhung chieu theo menh troi thi rat tot ve sau.

Pray.PrayWord: Moc viet khuc truc, co su sinh truong! Dac tinh phat trien. Ngu Moc, la cuc diem cua Moc!
Pray.PrayThing: Tam bao; cac ha ngay nay gap phai van may, neu tim kho tang, at thu duoc vat quy.

Pray.PrayWord: Cu Moc tai Thuy, trung luu de tru! Moc khong cot o to va cot o re sau.
Pray.PrayThing: Van su giai nghi; Thien Dia Nhan, tam nguyen quy nhat, co viec nao ma chang thanh?

Pray.PrayWord: Cuong Moc dac Hoa, phuong hoa ky ngoan! Thoi van thinh qua, nguoc lai menh troi.
Pray.PrayThing: An nhan; lam dung menh so, qua muc lam hai den le troi, than trong voi dieu do.

Pray.PrayWord: Cuong lam chi Tho, Moc di vi duong! Troi cao dat rong, bang huu rong choi phieu lang.
Pray.PrayThing: Van su giai nghi; bien rong ca loi tung tang, troi cao chim bay vo dinh, bang huu co biet chang.

Pray.PrayWord: Tam Thuy vi nhat, the nhu ba dao! Rua sach bun dat, vang that hien ra.
Pray.PrayThing: Dang cao vong vien; dung mot minh tren dinh nui, roi khoi coi hong tran gio bui, troi bien mot mau do mat troi.

Pray.PrayWord: Cuong Thuy dac Moc, phuong tiet ky the! Co cong gang suc di tim cay quy, rot cuoc khong duoc.
Pray.PrayThing: Tinh dinh nhan toa; To long giang mai cung chung, Xuan hoa thu nguyet truoc them reu lan.

Pray.PrayWord: Thuy viet nhuan ha, mat me de chiu, dac tinh co chieu huong di xuong. Ngu Thuy, la cuc diem cua Thuy.
Pray.PrayThing: Tam nhan chi hanh; thay cua ta o ben canh, Lo Khac hoi rang: Hiep si ngay nay phai hoc o thay minh nhung dieu hay le phai hoac truyen thu cho hoc tro.

Pray.PrayWord: Nhieu nuoc gom lai thanh bien, chua dung van vat.
Pray.PrayThing: Lieu khuoc thu sinh duyen; duyen ngan nam, tinh kho duoc, kiep nay phai nem trai qua.

Pray.PrayWord: Thuy vuong dac Tho, phuong thanh tri chieu! Tinh mem nhu nuoc, quan quyt van vuong.
Pray.PrayThing: Ty duc; tinh nay do troi tac hop, thanh y cua nguoi that kho ma tu choi, giac mong tram nam.

Pray.PrayWord: Chung Hoa khac Kim, Kim bat ton, Thuy nan luu! Lua cat ngat troi, khi the that manh me.
Pray.PrayThing: Doat tuyet dai su; co hoi hom nay, khong the de mat, mat roi kho tim lai duoc, that nan giai khi quyet dinh.

Pray.PrayWord: Lua chay ao ao, dot cay tao the! Khi the nay, that giong voi khi the cua bac quan vuong.
Pray.PrayThing: Du huu hao am; chi lon sap thanh, chi co nguoi tri ky la co the cung huong.

Pray.PrayWord: Hoa vuong dac Thuy, phuong thanh tuong te! Co duoc nguoi hien o ben thi do la dieu vo cung may man.
Pray.PrayThing: Yen quan than; nguoi anh hung khong phai thanh nhan; sai lam kho ma tranh khoi; vi vay phai co nguoi hien tro giup.

Pray.PrayWord: Hoa viet viem thuong; suc nong lan toa, dac tinh co chieu huong tang len. Ngu Hoa, la cuc diem cua Hoa.
Pray.PrayThing: Vo hoc tu luyen; nguoi hoc vo ngay nay dung cong ren luyen, at se co ket qua!

Pray.PrayWord: Lua chay hung huc, trang chi da toai, dung quen nhung nguoi da mat.
Pray.PrayThing: Thu phong te; co bay trong gio thu do nhu mau, ba ngan nam xuong trang, ruou duc nay lam sao dem te duoc.

Pray.PrayWord: Cuong Tho dac Kim, phuong che ky ung! Cai anh huong lon nhat doi voi dao duc chinh la vat chat.
Pray.PrayThing: Ho ban dap thanh; o mai trong xo, tat nhien trong long cam thay buc boi, ben ngoai co dai um tum, may bay luon lo, suong nhu ngoc biec.

Pray.PrayWord: Chung Tho, son da, Moc vi chiet! Mot man bui hong kho long thanh nui.
Pray.PrayThing: Tuyet y lang tuyet dinh; bien may cuon cuon, ngo coi Bong Lai, nho nhung trong gio, coi tien long hoai.

Pray.PrayWord: Da len tien canh, hoai the lam chi! Lo truoc thien ha, vui sau thien ha.
Pray.PrayThing: Quan pham tinh; mot than nhap the, giup do tram dan, khuyen nhu do danh, nhu tinh ruot thit.

Pray.PrayWord: Da Tho Hoa hoi, nhien chuc hoa thuan thanh! Tu vi da tham hau, di ve phia tay khong chut lo lang.
Pray.PrayThing: Thai dan; mo lo luyen, than dan long lanh, uong de len tien.

Pray.PrayWord: Tho vien gia tuong, trong trot, dac tinh sinh hoa van vat. Ngu Tho, la cuc diem cua Tho!
Pray.PrayThing: Xuan hoa thu thuc; van so ngay nay nhung viec thuoc ve sinh san thu hoach rat thuan loi.
